vBRIEFInfo.author: Viz
vBRIEFInfo.description: DurabilityBackend v1 — runtime-agnostic execution seam (PRD scope)

narratives.ProblemStatement: eve's durable session/turn/HITL execution is implemented directly against @workflow/core (use workflow, use step, hooks, writables, child turnWorkflow runs, Vercel cron transport). That coupling lives in packages/eve/src/execution/ and internal/workflow-bundle/. Operators can swap Workflow World storage via experimental.workflow.world, but cannot swap the execution engine. The deftai/eve fork needs a seam—DurabilityBackend/DurabilityPort—parallel to SandboxBackend, so future adapters (Rivet, in-memory tests) can plug in without rewriting the harness, compiler, or agent/ authoring model.
narratives.Goals: G1: Introduce DurabilityPort primitives (checkpoints, inboxes, event log, child turn jobs, schedule trigger hook) behind DurabilityBackend. G2: Ship vercelWorkflow() adapter that delegates to existing @workflow/core with zero observable behavior change. G3: Ship inMemory() adapter for dev/tests behind experimental.durability.backend. G4: Extract SessionDriver/TurnDriver orchestration that calls the port, not Workflow directives directly. G5: Add unit/integration tests for port and adapters; keep all existing test tiers green.
narratives.NonGoals: NG1: rivet() or agentOS actors/workflows/cron adapter in v1. NG2: Author-facing rivet or temporal backends. NG3: Replacing experimental.workflow.world (coexists in v1). NG4: Changing Nitro HTTP host, channels, sandbox backends, or harness tool-loop semantics. NG5: Running agentOS/Pi/Claude agents inside guest VM alongside eve harness. NG6: Mandatory upstream vercel/eve PR in v1 (fork-first prove-out). NG7: Public DurabilityBackend factory parity with defineSandbox in v1 (experimental field only).
narratives.LockedDecisions: Path: Full (PRD then SPEC). v1 milestone: seam only. Author surface: middle ground—production defaults vercelWorkflow(); inMemory() opt-in via experimental.durability.backend in agent.ts. inMemory guard: warn in production, allow with operator override env. Port scope v1: full session driver primitives. Parity bar: all existing unit/integration/scenario tiers green plus new tests for port/adapters. workflow.world: coexists; vercelWorkflow uses active world. Upstream: fork-first on deftai/eve.
narratives.FunctionalRequirements: FR-1: DurabilityBackend interface MUST include stable name, session start, checkpoint, inbox create/resume, event append/read stream, child job start/await, and schedule trigger registration hooks sufficient to implement current workflow-entry and turn-workflow behavior. FR-2: vercelWorkflow() MUST preserve continuation-token exclusivity, hook conflict semantics, NextDriverAction contract, DurableSessionState migrations, pinned parent vs latest child turn routing, and streaming event ordering. FR-3: experimental.durability.backend MUST accept inMemory() and default to vercelWorkflow() when unset. FR-4: inMemory() MUST support vitest unit/integration tiers without Workflow bundler. FR-5: Runtime public API (run/deliver/getEventStream) MUST remain unchanged. FR-6: WorkflowBundleBuilder and use workflow transforms MUST remain encapsulated inside vercelWorkflow() adapter until a second production adapter exists.
narratives.NonFunctionalRequirements: NFR-1: Zero behavior change—no author-visible semantic differences vs upstream eve on vercelWorkflow path. NFR-2: All existing unit, integration, and scenario tests MUST pass without assertion changes unless fixing pre-existing fork drift. NFR-3: New code MUST follow eve AGENTS.md—wrap third-party APIs, tests for public surfaces, small modules. NFR-4: inMemory in production MUST emit actionable warning; MAY allow via env override. NFR-5: DurabilityBackend name participates in cache/reconnect keys where applicable (mirror SandboxBackend precedent). NFR-6: No new runtime dependencies in packages/eve beyond nitro (adapters vendor or optional peer pattern like just-bash if needed later).
narratives.SuccessMetrics: SM-1: pnpm test:unit and test:integration and test:scenario green on deft/durability-backend. SM-2: New inMemory adapter tests cover checkpoint replay, inbox deliver, and event stream read without @workflow/core. SM-3: vercelWorkflow adapter integration tests demonstrate identical NextDriverAction sequences vs baseline on representative session/turn fixtures. SM-4: Docs updated for experimental.durability.backend and relationship to experimental.workflow.world. SM-5: research/durability-backend.md drafted for optional future upstream PR.
narratives.OpenQuestions: OQ-1: Exact experimental.durability.backend TypeScript shape and export path (eve/agent config vs internal compile manifest). OQ-2: Env override name for production inMemory warning bypass. OQ-3: Whether schedule trigger hook is abstracted in v1 or thin-delegates to existing Nitro cron route unchanged. OQ-4: Module layout—shared/durability-backend.ts vs execution/durability/ tree.
narratives.InterviewLog: Q1 sizing: Full. Q2 v1: seam only. Q3 author: middle ground. Q4 experimental shape: agent.ts experimental.durability.backend. Q5 upstream: fork-first. Q6 port: full session driver. Q7 parity: all tiers green + new port tests. Q8 inMemory guard: warn prod. Q9 world: coexist.
